case_title: WEST VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICES, INC vs. BRADLEY, ROOSEVELT, IND & DBA BRADLEY'S MOBILE

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICES, INC AS TO DEFENDANT BRADLEY, ROOSEVELT, IND & DBA BRADLEY'S MOBILE AUTO TOW, AND DBA BRADLEY'S MOBILE AUTO SERVICE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-22-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-23-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-02-1993
REPLY TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND DECL OF JONATHAN R. HICKMAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST VALLEY COLLECTION SERVICES, INC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED AND CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF COURT. HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
